name: AHT (Average Handle Time)
description: Agent took too long to respond to the customer (e.g. more than 3 minutes between messages without warning).

name: ART (Agent Response Time)
description: Initial response time was too slow.

name: CRITICAL
description: A severe policy violation or critical failure according to the core rules.

name: MISLEADING
description: Agent provided false, inaccurate, or unsupported information to the customer.

name: GRAMMATICAL
description: Significant grammar or spelling errors that affect comprehension.

name: WRONG IDENTIFICATION
description: Agent addressed the wrong issue or completely misunderstood the customer's intent.

name: Escalation Delay
description: Agent failed to escalate the issue to the proper tier when required, or delayed it unnecessarily.

name: In Progress
description: The issue is currently being resolved.
